modpacks.name: Mac Native
modpacks.summary: A meticulously tuned modpack engineered for Apple Silicon. Native ARM64 paths, Metal-accelerated rendering, zero Rosetta overhead.
modpacks.description: Mac Native is the first modpack designed from the ground up for the M-series chip. Every mod has been audited for ARM64 compatibility, JVM flags are tuned for unified memory, and shaders fall back gracefully on integrated GPUs.
modpacks.installGuide:
## Installation — Mac Native

### 1. Install a launcher
Download **Prism Launcher** (recommended) or the official Minecraft launcher.

### 2. Install Java 21 (ARM64)
```bash
brew install --cask temurin@21
```

### 3. Import the modpack
- Open Prism → *Add Instance* → *Import from Modrinth*
- Paste: `https://modrinth.com/modpack/mac-native`

### 4. Allocate RAM
In instance settings, set **8 GB** maximum heap.

### 5. Launch
First boot compiles shaders — give it ~60s. Subsequent boots are instant.

changelog.notes: Sodium 0.6 update, fixed shader stutter on M1.
Added 12 quality-of-life mods, removed deprecated forks.

modpacks.name: CraftToons
modpacks.summary: Saturday-morning cartoon vibes meet hardcore mod content. Vivid shaders, custom textures, friendly mobs.
modpacks.description: CraftToons reimagines vanilla Minecraft as a cel-shaded animated world. Bundled with a curated shader, custom resource pack, and 140+ mods that lean into the playful aesthetic without sacrificing depth.

features.title: Custom cel-shader
features.description: A bespoke shader pipeline that strips PBR and replaces lighting with hand-painted gradients.

features.title: 1024× textures
features.description: Every block re-drawn at 1024px with hand-inked outlines, optimized for Embeddium streaming.

features.title: Toon mob skins
features.description: All 87 vanilla mobs reskinned with exaggerated proportions and animated facial rigs.

features.title: Soundtrack overhaul
features.description: Original 24-track score by indie composer Mira Voss. Dynamic intensity, looping cleanly.

features.title: World gen tweaks
features.description: Saturated biomes, oversized flora, animated cloud layers. Built on Terralith presets.

features.title: Family-friendly chat
features.description: Built-in profanity filter and child-mode toggle. Perfect for shared family realms.

modpacks.installGuide:
## Installation — CraftToons

### 1. Get the launcher
Use the **CurseForge App** for the smoothest experience with Forge modpacks.

### 2. Install Java 17
Included automatically by CurseForge — no extra steps.

### 3. Import
Search *CraftToons* in the modpack browser → **Install**.

### 4. Allocate RAM
Set **10 GB** in profile settings for the full 1024× texture experience.

### 5. Enable shaders
The cel-shader is bundled. Open *Video Settings → Shaders* and select **CraftToons.zip**.

changelog.notes: New cel-shader, 8 new toon-style mob skins.
Major overhaul, dropped Optifine for Embeddium.

modpacks.name: Astralrinth
modpacks.summary: Deep space dimensions, magic systems, and progression that respects your time. Built around Ad Astra and Astral Sorcery.
modpacks.description: Astralrinth is a 240-mod expedition through interplanetary travel and constellation-based magic. Carefully balanced quest progression, JEI integration, and a custom main menu skybox.
modpacks.installGuide:
## Installation — Astralrinth

### 1. Use Prism Launcher
NeoForge support is best in **Prism**.

### 2. Install Java 21
Via your package manager or [Adoptium](https://adoptium.net).

### 3. Import from Modrinth
Paste the Modrinth URL into Prism's import dialog.

### 4. Allocate 12 GB RAM
This pack uses chunky world-gen — don't undershoot.

### 5. Quest book
First spawn → check inventory for the **Cosmic Codex**. Right-click to open.

changelog.notes: Beta release. Quest book complete to chapter 7.
